languageStrings.LBL_MAIL_ACCOUNTS_DESCRIPTION: Manage group and personal mail accounts
languageStrings.LBL_PERSONAL_ACCOUNT_USE_MAIL_SAVE: Personal accounts are saved via the Mail module
languageStrings.LBL_CRM_GROUP_HELP: Group members can send from this account (personal + group in the compose dialog).
languageStrings.LBL_MAIL_IMAP_AUTH_FAILED: IMAP login failed — check the email address (username) and password.
languageStrings.LBL_MAIL_IMAP_CONNECT_FAILED: Could not connect to the IMAP server — check host, port, and encryption (SSL/TLS).
languageStrings.LBL_MAIL_IMAP_TLS_FAILED: SSL/TLS certificate or encryption error while connecting to IMAP.
languageStrings.LBL_MAIL_SMTP_AUTH_FAILED: SMTP authentication failed — check the email address (username) and password.
languageStrings.LBL_MAIL_IMAP_FOLDER_LIST_FAILED: IMAP login and SMTP authentication succeeded, but the server folder list could not be retrieved.
